executives.name: Peter Steenkamp
executives.background: Mr. Steenkamp was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer in October 2023. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Harmony Gold Mining Company and African Rainbow Minerals.
